motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```class Solution:
    def equalFrequency(self, word: str) -> bool:
        for i in range(len(word)):
            new_word = word[:i] + word[i+1:]
            if len(set(new_word)) == len(new_word) and len(set(c for c in new_word if c != ' ')) == len(set(new_word)):
                return True
        return False
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n * m)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
starter_check_reason: não consegui ler assinatura do starter
